name: Historical Fiction Ontology
description: Entity types and relations for historical fiction — no magic, grounded in real-world social structures

entityTypes.name: HistoricalPeriod
entityTypes.description: A specific era or time period

entityTypes.name: Institution
entityTypes.description: A church, guild, court, or other institution

entityTypes.name: HistoricalEvent
entityTypes.description: A real or fictional historical event

entityTypes.name: Occupation
entityTypes.description: A profession or role in society

consistencyRules.description: Characters should not use technology from future periods
consistencyRules.query: MATCH (c:Character)-[:LIVES_IN_PERIOD]->(p:HistoricalPeriod), (c)-[:POSSESSES]->(a) WHERE a.invented_year > p.end_year RETURN c.name as violation

consistencyRules.description: Flag potentially anachronistic gender-occupation combinations for review
consistencyRules.query: MATCH (c:Character)-[:PRACTICES]->(o:Occupation) WHERE o.gender_restrictions IS NOT NULL RETURN c.name, o.name as potential_anachronism
